case_title: LACORA SHANETTE BENARD VS. CHRISTOPHER WILLARD WOOD

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE BASED ON PROGRESS REPORT OF 4/20/15. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BENARD, LACORA SHANETTE ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE MORGAN PRICKETT. FILED BY BENARD, LACORA SHANETTE WOOD, CHRISTOPHER WILLARD
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,394.04 FILED BY BENARD, LACORA SHANETTE AS TO DEFENDANT WOOD, CHRISTOPHER WILLARD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-20-2015 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
RETURNED MAIL: ORDER OF DISMISSAL MAILED TO DEFENDANT RETURNED = RETURN TO SENDER, NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED, UNABLE TO FORWARD.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 SERVED MAR-11-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WOOD, CHRISTOPHER WILLARD

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-20-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAY-20-2015 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. DEFENDANT PAID PLAINTIFF BY CHECK IN COURT TODAY. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MORGAN PRICKETT. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
